description: An episode's byte-lifecycle (on_card→…→purged) + the spot-check held-purge fields — CONTRACT §3.1, A-2.

episode_id.description: The episode whose bytes these are (the key; one footage_reference per episode, A-2).

footage_state.description: The byte lifecycle (domain-closed hard enum; `purged` per CONTRACT §3). Safe-to-purge once on_hades verified.

locations.description: Current location(s) as tier:path strings (scalar array; structured per-location = STOP-and-flag, OQ-B).

purge_eligible_at.description: = max(rendered_on_hades_at, the N-day window) — earliest Styx purge; watermark may bound it (OQ-5, values deferred).

rendered_on_hades_at.description: When the single Hermes renderer produced the canonical artifact on Hades (OQ-5 held-purge input).

selection_method.description: WHY held — auto QC sample or a manual pull (domain-closed enum; OMITTED when not selected — absent, not null, OQ-5).

spot_check_selected.description: Selected for the fast-feedback spot-check (delays the purge; OQ-5). Requires selection_method (OQ-11).
